ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "max_seats" INTEGER /* Maximum number of seats available for the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "corequisites" TEXT /* Corequisites for the course */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the course is an elective or a core course */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the course is offered online */,
  "course_website" TEXT /* URL for the course's website or learning management system (LMS) page */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the course information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_code" TEXT /* Code of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "department_email" TEXT /* Email address for the department */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the department */,
  "department_location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "department_website" TEXT /* URL for the department's website */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the department was established */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students currently enrolled in the department */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "admission_year" INTEGER /* Year of admission */,
  "expected_graduation_year" INTEGER /* Expected year of graduation */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's academic adviser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course section */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the enrollment (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "dropped_date" TEXT /* Date the student dropped the course (if applicable) */,
  "audit_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the course is being audited */,
  "final_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the final exam for the course */,
  "midterm_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the midterm exam for the course */,
  "assignment_dates" TEXT /* Dates of major assignments */,
  "is_withdrawn" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the student has withdrawn from the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the faculty member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department of the faculty member */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the faculty member (e.g., Assistant Professor, Professor) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the faculty member */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Office phone number of the faculty member */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the faculty member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the faculty member */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the faculty member was hired */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Annual salary of the faculty member */,
  "teaching_hours" INTEGER /* Total teaching hours per semester */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the faculty member */,
  "is_on_sabbatical" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the faculty member is on sabbatical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "section_number" INTEGER /* Section number */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member assigned to the section */,
  "classroom" TEXT /* Classroom where the section is held */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the section */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the section */,
  "days_of_week" TEXT /* Days of the week the section is held */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the section */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the section */,
  "max_seats" INTEGER /* Maximum number of seats available in the section */,
  "enrolled_students" INTEGER /* Number of students currently enrolled in the section */,
  "syllabus_link" TEXT /* URL for the course syllabus */,
  "is_hybrid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the section is hybrid (partly online, partly in-person) */,
  "enrollment_open_date" TEXT /* Date when enrollment opens for the section */,
  "enrollment_close_date" TEXT /* Date when enrollment closes for the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classrooms" (
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classroom */,
  "classroom_name" TEXT /* Name of the classroom */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the classroom is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the classroom */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the classroom (e.g., projector, whiteboard) */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the classroom (e.g., available, reserved) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last classroom inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next classroom inspection */,
  "is_accessible" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the classroom is accessible for students with disabilities */,
  "is_equipped_for_online" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the classroom is equipped for online teaching */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classroom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course section */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the schedule */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the schedule */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the schedule is confirmed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the schedule entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
